==== tluaNoImportExport.tlua (35 errors) ====
    // tlua has no TypeScript module syntax: a chunk loads its dependencies with
    // `require` and returns its own value.
    import { named } from "m";
    ~~~~~~
!!! error TLUA1128: Declaration or statement expected.
           ~
!!! error TLUA1128: Declaration or statement expected.
             ~~~~~

                     ~~~~
